news.headline: AdvisorVault unites Microsoft 365 with their 17a-4 D3P service to assist clients in complying with FINRA rule 17a-4.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in New York, AdvisorVault recognized issues faced by customers in adhering to FINRA rule 17a-4 regarding electronic records retention. To address this, they transitioned to being a Microsoft 365 Cloud Service Provider (365 CSP). This move allowed them to combine all Microsoft 365 features with their 17a-4 D3P service. By doing so, firms now have improved capabilities in meeting regulatory requirements efficiently.

news.headline: CVR Partners reports Q4 2024 net income of $18 million, EBITDA of $50 million on net sales of $140 million, compared to Q4 2023.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on February 18, 2025, CVR Partners, LP, a company trading under the ticker symbol NYSE: UAN, disclosed their financial results. The manufacturer of ammonia and urea ammonium nitrate (“UAN”) solution fertilizer products reported a net income of $18 million, equivalent to $1.73 per common unit, and EBITDA of $50 million from net sales totaling $140 million for the fourth quarter of 2024. In comparison, the same period in 2023 saw a net income of $10 million, or 94 cents per common unit, and EBITDA of $38 million from net sales of $142 million.

news.headline: CVR Energy's Q4, 2024 financial results: $28M net income, 13 cents per share loss, $40M net income, 122M EBITDA, 67M adjusted EBITDA.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on February 18, 2025, CVR Energy, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024. The net income attributable to CVR Energy stockholders for this period was reported at $28 million, translating to 28 cents per diluted share. This marks a decrease from the fourth quarter of 2023, which saw net income at $91 million, or 91 cents per diluted share. The adjusted loss per diluted share for Q4 2024 was 13 cents, contrasting with adjusted earnings of 65 cents per diluted share in Q4 2023. The total net income for the last quarter of 2024 amounted to $40 million, a decrease from the $97 million reported in the same period in 2023. EBITDA for Q4 2024 was noted at $122 million, down from $204 million in Q4 2023. Additionally, adjusted EBITDA for the fourth quarter of 2024 saw a decrease to $67 million, compared to the previous year's $170 million.

news.headline: Find out the Fed's stance on Trump's tariffs and inflation soon. Stay tuned for updates.
Cadence Design Systems Q4 earnings beat expectations, with $1.36 billion revenue and $1.88 EPS. Shares drop due to soft guidance.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc (NASDAQ:CDNS) released their Q4 financial results with revenue hitting $1.36 billion, slightly exceeding the estimated $1.35 billion. Adjusted EPS stood at $1.88, surpassing the projected $1.82. The company experienced a 27% increase in total revenue compared to the previous year. They closed the quarter with a record backlog of $6.8 billion and current remaining performance obligations totaling $3.4 billion. Additionally, Cadence reported holding $2.64 billion in cash. For a comprehensive analysis, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: West Red Lake plans $12.3M bought deal public offering of charity flow-through units.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.3% in the month of September, indicating a decrease of 0.5% compared to the previous month. The number of employed individuals has also increased by 250,000, reaching a total of 30.5 million people actively working. Additionally, the average hourly wage has risen by 2.7% year-on-year, now standing at $25.60. These promising figures suggest a positive trend in the country's labor market, with more people finding jobs and experiencing growth in their wages.

news.headline: 3 reasons for stablecoin growth worldwide. Will US adopt under Trump? Emerging markets see rise in stablecoin use despite lacking regulations & banking infrastructure.
news.summary: The adoption of stablecoins in developing nations is rapidly increasing, despite the lack of supportive cryptocurrency regulations and traditional banking services. The use of stablecoins has surged in these markets, emphasizing their popularity and functionality. The United States may need to work towards following this trend to stay aligned with the global shift towards digital currencies.

news.headline: Penguin Solutions stock sees an increase in IBD RS Rating to 79, indicating improving technical performance.
news.summary: Penguin Solutions has experienced an upgrade in its Relative Strength Rating, reaching a score of 79, indicating improving technical performance. This spike raises the question of whether this positive trend will be sustained in the future.

news.headline: Incyte stock's relative strength rating increases to 71, reflecting improved price performance. (Total characters: 86)
news.summary: Incyte has demonstrated a positive trend in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 71. This improvement indicates solid momentum in the stock's performance.

news.headline: Meta stock fell, ending Facebook parent's 20-day win streak. Closed Tuesday trading lower, impacting record trend.
news.summary: The stock of Meta, the parent company of Facebook, experienced a decline in Tuesday's trading session, marking the end of an unprecedented 20-day streak of consecutive gains. This halt in momentum resulted in Meta Stock closing lower than previous days. The news was reported by Investor's Business Daily, highlighting the significance of this market shift.

news.headline: Recursion Pharmaceuticals stock reaches elite RS rating of over 90, as reported on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Recursion Pharmaceuticals experiences a surge in its Relative Strength Rating, reaching a prestigious level of 90 or higher. This notable achievement underscores the company's market performance and potential for growth.

news.headline: Occidental Petroleum, Warren Buffett's favorite energy stock, sees surprise profit growth alongside debt reduction focus.
news.summary: In recent quarters, Occidental Petroleum has focused on reducing its debt. The energy company, favored by Warren Buffett, recently reported a surprise growth in profits while maintaining its focus on reducing debt.

news.headline: Shift4 acquired Global Blue, leading to share drop due to weak 2025 outlook with revenue and EBITDA below expectations. Q4 earnings exceeded estimates.
news.summary: Shift4's stock price experienced a drop following the release of its full-year 2025 revenue and EBITDA guidance, which fell short of projections. However, Q4 earnings for Shift4 exceeded expectations. The announcement of the acquisition of Global Blue added to the news, causing a decrease in share value due to the weak outlook for 2025.

news.headline: Arista beats earnings estimates with revenue outlook slightly above views amid AI-driven data center upgrades.
news.summary: Arista's revenue guidance for the March quarter exceeded expectations, suggesting a positive outlook as investors reconsider investments in AI-driven data center upgrades. Earnings for Arista also surpassed estimates, reflecting strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Cadence Design Systems outperformed in Q4, but disappointed with 2025 guidance, leading to CDNS stock decline.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems exceeded expectations for Q4 but disappointed with its 2025 forecast, causing CDNS stock to decline. The company's stock saw a drop due to weaker guidance for the year 2025.

news.headline: Occidental Petroleum Q4 results: EPS beats at 80 cents, revenue misses at $6.83 billion, down from $7.52 billion. Shares slide.
news.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corp. (NYSE:OXY) released its fourth-quarter financial results after Tuesday's market close. The company reported earnings of 80 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 70 cents and up from 74 cents per share in the previous year. Quarterly revenue totaled $6.83 billion, falling short of the expected $7.05 billion and down from $7.52 billion in the same quarter last year. This information was disclosed alongside news of US and Russian officials commencing peace talks regarding Ukraine. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

Bumble earnings report featured on Bloomberg's Closing Bell.
Trump on Venezuela oil exports via Chevron: Maybe not. $CVX
Clean Freak Car Wash opens new location in Celina, TX, merging tech & sustainability for a better car wash experience.
news.summary: In the bustling city of Dallas on February 18, 2025, Clean Freak Car Wash, in partnership with Circle K, unveiled its latest branch in Celina, TX. Boasting state-of-the-art facilities, budget-friendly packages, and a commitment to environmental responsibility, this new location promises an unrivaled car washing experience to all patrons.

news.headline: J.P. Morgan to liquidate JPMorgan Sustainable Infrastructure ETF (BLLD), allowing shareholders to trade shares before delisting.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, J.P. Morgan Asset Management revealed plans for the liquidation and dissolution of the JPMorgan Sustainable Infrastructure ETF (BLLD). Shareholders are advised to trade their shares before the de-listing date on Nasdaq at prevailing market rates. Further details on the final...

news.headline: Trump: Looking at Venezuela very seriously.
Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. (DMAAU) closed IPO over-allotment, raising $30 million with 3 million units sold at $10 each.
news.summary: A Florida-based company called Drugs Made In America Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: DMAAU) shared that its underwriter for the initial public offering has fully exercised its option to buy an additional 3,000,000 units for $10.00 each, bringing in an extra $30,000,000 in gross proceeds. The units, which started trading on the Nasdaq Global Market with the symbol “DMAAU” on January 28, 2025, have seen significant investment activity.

news.headline: Innospec reports Q4 revenue of $466.8 million, down 6%. Net loss of $70.4 million with operating income growth in Performance Chemicals. $25.7 million cash generated with net cash of $289.2 million. Non-cash charge of $155.6 million on UK pension scheme buyout. GAAP loss per share $2.80; adjusted non-GAAP EPS $1.41. Total 2024 revenue $1.85 billion, down 5%. Net income $35.6 million. Adjusted EBITDA $225.2 million for the year. CEO optimistic about growth opportunities.
news.summary: Innospec Inc. reported their financial results for Q4 2024 and full year ended December 31, 2024. The total revenues for Q4 were $466.8 million, a 6% decrease from the same period last year. The net loss was $70.4 million, mainly due to a $155.6 million non-cash settlement charge on a UK pension scheme buyout. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $56.6 million. For the full year, total revenues were $1.85 billion, a 5% decrease from the previous year. Net income for 2024 was $35.6 million, impacted by the UK pension scheme buyout. Adjusted EBITDA for the year was $225.2 million, up 4% from 2023. Performance Chemicals operating income increased by 14%, Fuel Specialties operating income was up by 7%, while Oilfield Services saw lower production chemical activity in Latin America. The company generated $25.7 million cash from operations and had a net cash balance of $289.2 million. Adjusted non-GAAP EPS was $1.41 for Q4 and $5.92 for the full year, showing resilience despite challenges.

news.headline: New Zealand PPI Inputs QoQ Actual -0.9% (Forecast -, Previous 1.9%)
New Zealand PPI Outputs QoQ Actual -0.1% (Forecast -, Previous 1.5%)
Paralyzed Veterans of America awards winners at 8th annual Wheelchair Rugby Invitational in Louisville, KY.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, on February 18, 2025, the eighth annual Wheelchair Rugby Invitational organized by Paralyzed Veterans of America took place. The event saw the presentation of the Code of Honor Cup to the victors of each division. Among the notable champions was the team WWAR.

news.headline: Hamilton Beach Brands Holding Company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.115 per share for both Class A and Class B Common Stock.
news.summary: In Glen Allen, Virginia, on February 18, 2025, Hamilton Beach Brands Holding Company (NYSE: HBB) shared that their Board of Directors approved a standard cash dividend of $0.115 per share. This dividend applies to both Class A and Class B Common Stock holders.

news.headline: Health Union launches new online community for those with opioid use disorder (OUD). Feb 18, 2025. Expands support services.
news.summary: A new online community focused on providing support for individuals dealing with opioid use disorder (OUD) has recently been introduced by Health Union, a prominent digital health organization. This initiative serves as an additional offering from Health Union, recognized for its expertise in online community-based activation and data. The community aims to assist those affected by OUD and is part of Health Union's ongoing efforts to address the prevalent issue of opioid misuse.

news.headline: Vascarta's transdermal curcumin gel may revolutionize sickle cell treatment, as per studies in PNAS Nexus.
news.summary: In a recent publication from the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences (PNAS) Nexus journal, Goel et al. conducted studies on humanized sickle cell mice utilizing Vascarta's transdermal curcumin gel known as "VAS-101." The research, conducted in Summit, N.J., on Feb. 18, 2025, shed light on the effects of this topical treatment, showcasing its potential benefits in managing sickle cell disease. This development highlights the promising role of Vascarta's formulation in targeting this condition, with significant implications for future therapeutic approaches.

news.headline: Capital Southwest appoints Michael Sarner as new CEO, with Chris Rehberger as CFO and Tabitha Geiger as CCO. Bowen Diehl steps down.
news.summary: Michael Sarner has been announced as the new President and Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Bowen Diehl. Additionally, Chris Rehberger has been promoted to Chief Financial Officer, Treasurer, and Secretary, while Tabitha Geiger has been promoted to Chief Compliance Officer. These changes mark a significant transition in leadership within the organization.

news.headline: Devon Energy beats Q4 earnings with $1.16 per share, reports $1.7B operating cash flow, raises quarterly dividend.
news.summary: Devon Energy Corp released its fourth-quarter financial report, surpassing analyst predictions with earnings of $1.16 per share compared to the expected $1.00. The company saw oil production hit 398,000 barrels per day, exceeding previous estimates by 3%. Operating cash flow stood at $1.7 billion, with free cash flow at $738 million for the quarter. Shareholders received $444 million through dividends and repurchases, while the company bought back $300 million worth of shares. Details of the report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Varsity Yearbook's Press Pass Academy starts with 75+ students gaining journalism and media experience at national championships.
news.summary: More than 75 students and advisors participated in a journalism and media event in Memphis, Tennessee on February 18, 2025. The event was the first of its kind and aimed to provide hands-on experience in the field. Varsity Spirit, a division of Varsity Brands known for its leadership in cheerleading, dance team, band apparel, camps, and competitions, organized the event.

news.headline: Duke Energy appoints Katherine Neebe as new CCO, replacing Oscar Suris. Effective Feb. 24, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina, Duke Energy made a significant announcement regarding a change in leadership. Katherine Neebe, the current senior vice president and chief sustainability officer, will take on the role of chief communications officer (CCO) starting from February 24. This move comes as Neebe succeeds Oscar Suris, who held the position of senior vice president and CCO. This internal restructuring is aimed at enhancing Duke Energy's communication strategies and further solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: SOL/ETH ratio sees reversal after hitting Jan record highs during memecoin scandals, traders note.
news.summary: The SOL to ETH ratio, which hit all-time highs in January, is now seeing a reversal as a result of memecoin controversies.

news.headline: Republican Senators considering selling radio spectrum for estimated $100 billion revenue.
Trump signs executive order seeking to reduce cost of IVF treatments.
Skeena Resources Limited secures C$70.5M in bought deal financing for 4,800,000 common shares at C$14.70 each.
news.summary: Skeena Resources Limited announced on Feb. 18, 2025, that they have entered into a deal with a group of underwriters led by BMO Capital Markets to buy 4,800,000 common shares of the company at C$14.70 per share, totaling around C$70.5 million. The underwriters have the option to increase the number of shares by 15% before the closing of the offering. The company is listed on the TSX as SKE and on the NYSE as SKE.

news.headline: Ackman's Pershing Square makes a bid for Howard Hughes with a new offer, details undisclosed.
Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI) to release Q4 2024 earnings on Feb. 26, 2025, hosting conference call on Feb. 27, 2025 at 2:00 P.M. ET.
news.summary: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI), a REIT focusing on owning and managing MH and RV communities and marinas, will unveil its Q4 2024 operating figures on February 26, 2025, post-market closure. Subsequently, on February 27, 2025, at 2:00 P.M. ET, the Company will conduct a conference call to address these results.

news.headline: Arcutis Biotherapeutics (NASDAQ: ARQT) to present at TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference on March 3-5.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Westlake Village, California, Arcutis Biotherapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: ARQT), a leading biopharmaceutical company specializing in immuno-dermatology advancements, disclosed its participation in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference scheduled for March 3-5, 2025. Arcutis aims to share its insights at the event as part of its commitment to driving innovation in the field.

news.headline: AEP Texas warns of severe Arctic cold front setting in Feb 18-20, with temps dipping below Jan levels, impacting communities.
news.summary: Important note for Texas residents: AEP Texas is urging customers to prepare for an upcoming Arctic cold front from February 18 to February 20, 2025. Temperatures are anticipated to plummet significantly below previous levels, threatening severe cold conditions across the area. Take necessary precautions to stay safe during this harsh freeze.

news.headline: Constellation Brands' E. Yuri Hermida leaves, Mallika Monteiro named interim Chief Growth & Strategy Officer.
news.summary: Mallika Monteiro has been appointed as the interim Chief Growth & Strategy Officer, in addition to her role as the Executive Vice President and Managing Director of Beer Brands. This change reflects her expanded responsibilities within the company.

news.headline: Coeur Mining reports 3.6M oz of gold, 270.5M oz of silver for 2024 reserves, reflecting 22% increase in gold reserves at Kensington.
news.summary: In Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE) revealed its 2024 year-end mineral reserves and resources. The company reported 3.6 million ounces of gold and 270.5 million ounces of silver in proven and probable mineral reserves. This represents a 22% rise in gold reserves at Kensington compared to the previous year. The numbers also include silver and gold ounces acquired recently as part of their exploration program at the Palmarejo operation.

news.headline: Ares Management increases Tempus debt facilities to $560 million, with $300 million in incremental financing for Ambry Genetics.
news.summary: In New York, Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES), a prominent global alternative investment manager, revealed that Ares Credit funds have assumed the role of administrative agent for $300 million in additional debt financing for Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM). Tempus is a technology company at the forefront of utilizing AI to enhance precision medicine and patient care. This funding aims to facilitate Tempus’ recent purchase of Ambry Genetics, following its announcement.

news.headline: Comtech appoints David B. Kagan as an independent director to its Board of Directors. He brings over 35 years of experience in satellite communications.
news.summary: Chandler, Arizona--On February 18, 2025, Comtech Telecommunications Corp. (NASDAQ: CMTL) appointed David B. Kagan as an independent director to its Board. Kagan brings over 35 years of experience in leading satellite communications companies. The appointment is effective from February 13, 2025. Comtech is a global communications technology leader.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile will provide a quarterly business update on March 3, 2025. Earnings release on March 3 at 5:00 p.m., followed by a conference call on March 4 at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). $ASTS.
news.summary: MIDLAND, Texas—AST SpaceMobile, Inc. ("AST SpaceMobile") will be releasing its earnings on Monday, March 3rd at 5:00 p.m. They are the creators of a unique space-based cellular broadband network that can be used with regular smartphones, catering to commercial and government needs. A quarterly business update conference call is scheduled for Tuesday, March 4th at 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time). AST SpaceMobile will address queries during the call. The company is listed as NASDAQ: ASTS.

news.headline: Know Labs announces 1 for 40 reverse stock split effective Feb 19, 2025, moving from NYSE American to OTC Pink Markets.
news.summary: In Seattle, Know Labs, Inc. (formerly known as KNW on NYSE American, now trading as KNWN on OTC Pink Markets) revealed a 1 for 40 reverse stock split for its common stock. This move, announced on February 18, 2025, will consolidate authorized and outstanding shares. The reverse split will take effect on February 19, 2025. This strategic decision aims to enhance the company's common stock value.

news.headline: OppFi (NYSE: OPFI) to report Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 5, 2025. Conference call at 9:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Announced today, OppFi Inc. (NYSE: OPFI) will release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 before market opening on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. Following this, a conference call will be held on the same day at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time by management to review the financial performance and future prospects of OppFi. This move aims to provide insights about the tech-driven finance platform connecting community banks to offer credit options to average Americans.

news.headline: Steve Worland, Ph.D., appointed as CEO of Atomwise, known for ML/AI in drug discovery. Over three decades of experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Atomwise, a company specializing in utilizing machine learning and artificial intelligence for enhancing small molecule drug discovery, revealed the selection of Steve Worland, Ph.D., as the new Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board of Directors. With over thirty years of expertise in leadership and research and development within various biotech and pharma firms, Dr. Worland will collaborate closely with Atomwise's current management team and Board of Directors.
